bundle.shortDescription: Offline manager for Markdown prompt snippets, organized by folder-as-project.
bundle.longDescription: Prompt Compose is an offline desktop app for managing prompt snippets. A snippet is a plain Markdown file whose filename is its name; a project is just a folder, so your whole library can live in your own git repo and read as clean diffs. Compose prompts by inserting snippets, fill their Python-format-string variables, and copy the result. Fully offline — your prompts never leave your machine.
